MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION OF PETITION TO QUASH SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM AND AD TESTIFICANDUM AND TO STAY THE TAKING OF THE DEPOSITION OF ROBERT KLINE (TRANSACTION ID # 77238714) FILED BY RESPONDENT ACCOR MANAGEMENT US INC.

LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO THE OCT-16-2025 HEARING RE: PETITIONER M&C NEW YORK (TIMES SQUARE) LLC'S HEARING ON PETITION TO QUASH SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM AND AD TESTIFICANDUM; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF M&C NEW YORK (TIMES SQUARE) LLC'S PETITION TO QUASH SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM AND AD TESTIFICANDUM IS OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING RE-NOTICED IF THE NEW YORK COURT DOES NOT FULLY RESOLVE ALL ISSUES RAISED BY THE PETITION TO QUASH. BOTH SIDES ACKNOWLEDGE THAT THE ISSUES BEFORE THIS COURT HAVE BEEN RAISED BEFORE THE NEW YORK COURT AND THAT THE NEW YORK COURT IS IN A BETTER POSITION THAN THIS COURT TO RESOLVE THOSE ISSUES. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/HEK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-16-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER M&C NEW YORK (TIMES SQUARE) LLC's Hearing on Petition to Quash Subpoena Duces Tecum and Ad Testificandum.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff M&C New York (Times Square) LLC's petition to quash subpoena duces tecum and ad testificandum is off calendar without prejudice to being re-noticed if the New York court does not fully resolve all issues raised by the petition to quash. Both sides acknowledge that the issues before this court have been raised before the New York court and that the New York court is in a better position than this court to resolve those issues.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)
